name: national_security_port_security_scanner_lumen_tru_loy
premise: A National Security response desk is in a fast-moving incident involving national security port security scanner lumen tru loy. Key inputs conflict, but the decision deadline is before regulators arrive. Every delay increases harm prevention and accountability. Stakeholders are already framing this as truth vs loyalty under pressure. A whistleblower has already contacted media; the narrative is forming now. Constraints: Ensure a usable human override/appeals path. Keep public statements strictly factual; label assumptions.

agents.name: Noah Navarro
agents.identity: I am Noah Navarro, accountable for a defensible call in National Security when time is collapsing.
agents.goal: I want to reduce immediate harm without locking in an unjust precedent that later betrays loyalty for truth.

agents.name: Elliot Kowalski
agents.identity: I am Elliot Kowalski, tasked with surfacing second-order harms and who bears the risk in National Security.
agents.goal: I want guardrails so loyalty isn’t quietly traded away under urgency in the name of truth.

choices: I will take a narrow, time-boxed action with immediate human override and impact checks, accepting slower stabilization to protect loyalty.
I will take a broad, immediate action to stabilize fast and measure impact after deployment, accepting higher risk to loyalty to secure truth under the deadline.
forced_choice.call_to_action: The deadline is before regulators arrive. Evidence is partial. Noah Navarro must decide under truth vs loyalty. What does Noah Navarro do?
